signals.signal_title: Occidental ruthless automation — 40% of onshore production transitioned to automated operations
signals.signal_description: Occidental's CEO Vicki Hollub has mandated 'ruthless automation' across Permian operations. Approximately 40% of onshore production now runs via automated AI/IoT field operations, driving ~9% reduction in domestic operational expenditures per BOE. Board-reviewed AI program confirmed in proxy statement. Confirms active, scaled AI deployment in operations.

signals.signal_title: Occidental CrownRock acquisition August 2024 — active IT systems integration demand
signals.signal_description: Occidental closed the $12B CrownRock acquisition in August 2024, adding significant Midland Basin scale. Post-acquisition IT integration of CrownRock systems into Occidental's infrastructure creates near-term IT spend demand across ERP, field automation, and data platforms.

signals.signal_title: Occidental Board reviews AI use cases — data analytics and operational efficiency confirmed in proxy
signals.signal_description: Occidental's 2024 proxy statement confirms the Board of Directors reviews AI use cases annually, specifically data analytics and operational efficiency applications. Board-level AI governance is a leading indicator of structured AI investment programs.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $26.72B. ~12,000 employees (post-CrownRock, OxyChem sold Oct 2025 to Berkshire Hathaway for $9.7B). Houston HQ in STOLA — clean account. No MSP identified. Azure + M365 + SAP confirmed. Ruthless automation mandate is key AI signal — 40% Permian production automated. CrownRock Aug 2024 = active IT integration demand. CEO transition (Hollub → COO Richard Jackson) = IT budget reset cycle. STRATOS DAC facility = emerging IT investment area. ai_maturity_score=13 (below ≥15). WWT opportunity: active automation and AI program, Permian digital operations, no MSP displacement needed.
